creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
This is a general php notice/warning. In case E_NOTICE is turned on php74 the same thing will appear in the log I believe. Except the fact that some notices has been turned into warnings in php80. For further details have a look at:
https://www.php.net/manual/en/migration80.incompatible.php

Although nextcloud mentions that php 8.0 is recommended I am not sure why backword incompatible code is still in the tree. Like for this specific instance at line 681 "array_key_exists"; it's behavior has had major changes in php80.
